subcodes.title: Words spoken at Haifa Pilgrim House, 1920-11-06
subcodes.first_line: We are speaking in Persian and you have to listen…. Man has two ears and one tongue, so he should hear twice and speak once…. I have walked far and am very tired
subcodes.subjects: @all things are in motion; kinds of motion, @celestial spheres [aflak]; planets; astronomy, @wisdom [hikmat], @spiritual transformation
